scripts.build:generated: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli -- build app.web.loj --out-dir generated
scripts.dev:generated: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli -- dev app.web.loj --out-dir .rdsl-dev/generated
scripts.demo:dev: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli && npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-runtime && node demo-dev.mjs
scripts.host:sync: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-cli -- host sync-react host --title "ReactDSL User Admin Host"
scripts.host:dev: npm run build:generated && npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-runtime && npm --prefix host run dev
scripts.host:build: npm run build:generated && npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/rdsl-runtime && npm --prefix host run build
